headline: Thermo Fisher Launches TacroType Test As Shares Trade Below Targets
summary: Thermo Fisher Scientific (NYSE:TMO) launched its TacroType Pharmacogenetic Test for transplant patients. The test is designed to support more personalized tacrolimus dosing based on a patient's genetic profile. The product targets transplant centers and clinicians involved in post transplant medication management. Thermo Fisher Scientific, traded as NYSE:TMO, is a large player in life sciences tools and diagnostics, supplying instruments, tests and services across research and clinical...
